description_long: This is a large, industrial-style dumpster with a weathered green exterior, showing signs of rust, grime, and surface scratches. The top features a split, hinged black lid made of heavy-duty material, likely plastic or metal, with two distinct sections for opening. The front face has two rectangular, recessed panels that may serve as reinforcement or mounting points, while the sides each have a single, robust rectangular panel. The back is plain, with visible wear and discoloration, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The overall construction is boxy and robust, designed to withstand heavy use and environmental stress. There are no visible wheels or handles, and no warning labels or signage are present.
description: A large, weathered green dumpster with a split black lid and reinforced rectangular panels on the front and sides. The surface is rusted and scratched, showing signs of heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two rectangular recessed panels and the split black lid on top.
description_view_1: Left side view with a single rectangular panel and the angled lid visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, worn green surface and no panels or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a single rectangular panel, mirroring the left side.
attribute_lid_type: split, hinged lid with two sections made of black plastic or metal, no visible locking or opening mechanisms
